title: OGraf — A new HTML standard (EBU NTS 2025)
speaker: Niels Borg
summary: Technical deck from the EBU Network Technology Seminar 2025. Manifest, Web Component lifecycle, render paths, and roadmap.

summary: The earliest publicly distributed OGraf deck — framing, motivation, and the foundational ideas that became the v1 spec.

title: tech-i issue 66 — Bringing flexibility to HTML5 graphics workflows with OGraf
summary: EBU tech-i magazine issue 66. The OGraf feature article covers workflow flexibility wins for broadcasters moving off proprietary stacks.
